note: Curated primary user flows for the reference app (Q2 / DEP4). These form the denominator for M1 (≥80% coverage). Marketing/corporate site — no auth (auth deferred to v2). Adjust if the site structure changes.

flows.name: Load home page
steps: Navigate to https://www.tarento.com/
Verify the hero/landing content and primary navigation render

flows.name: Use primary navigation menu
steps: From the home page, open the main navigation
Verify top-level menu items are present and clickable

flows.name: View services / what-we-do section
steps: Navigate to the Services / What We Do area from the nav
Verify the services listing renders

flows.name: View industries section
steps: Navigate to the Industries area from the nav
Verify industry content renders

flows.name: Browse case studies / work
steps: Navigate to Case Studies / Work
Open an individual case study and verify its detail page renders

flows.name: Browse insights / blog
steps: Navigate to Insights / Blog
Open an article and verify the article page renders

flows.name: View About / Company page
steps: Navigate to About / Company
Verify company information renders

flows.name: View careers page
steps: Navigate to Careers
Verify open roles or careers content renders

flows.name: Open contact page and form
steps: Navigate to Contact
Verify the contact form fields render
Validate the form rejects empty submission

flows.name: Use footer navigation links
steps: Scroll to the footer on any page
Verify footer links are present and navigable
